titleStmt.title: SII 9.225: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 225. (A.R. No. 204 of 1913.) ON A SLAB SET UP IN THE VERANDAH OF THE BASAVESVARA TEMPLE AT BAILUR, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 56, Dundubhi (wrong), Māgha, ba. 10, Ādivāra, probably corresponding to A.D. 1131 January 25 Sunday. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva. During the governorship of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Bīvarasa of Baḷḷāre, Bīra-Gavuḍa of Haṭṭaṇa is said to have made a gift of 2 mattars of land for the service of the god Mallikārjuna and placed it in charge of Dēvarāsi-Paṇḍita of Ḍōṇiyabīḍu. It may be noted that the king who was on the throne in the year cited was Sōmēśvara III, who does not seem to have had the surname Tribhuvanamalla.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . yamuniyamu(niya)svādhyāyadhānadhāraṇamaunā
nuṣṭānajapasamādhisīḷaguṇadēvatāpūjātatpararappa śrī
matu ḍōṇiyabīḍina dēvarāsipaṁḍitargge . Idu samastabhuva
vanāsrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirājaṁ paramē
svaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷu
khyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu tribhuvanamalladēvaru vijayarājya
muttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saltamirala
56 neya duṁdubhisaṁvatsara Āsāḍa bahuḷa dasamiyādivāradaṁdu sva
sti śrīmanumahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara baḷḷāreya bīvarasaru sukhasaṁkathāvinō
dadiṁ haṭṭaṇada bīragavuḍa dēvarāsipaṁḍitargge kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ
māḍi śrīmalikārjjunadēvargge biṭṭa datti kāsmīrabhūmi matta 2 Īdanā
vanōrbbanilleṁdana bāyalu kōṣṭaṁ mūḍugu
kālē kālē yācatē rāmacaṁdra . svadatvaṁ va para
datvaṁ(va) vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara . kuṁbhipā
kadalu bīḷvaru saṣṭirvvarsa sa haśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .The letters saṣṭirvvarsasa are written above the line.
Digital edition of SII 9.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
